flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Arkansas State University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($12.7k → $14.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Arkansas State University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.1k → $8.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Arkansas State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Arkansas State University rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 (7.5k → 9.1k).
